QueryBody: SELECT TOP 1 CONCAT(lastName , ',' , ' ' ,firstName) FROM OHEM T0 WHERE T0.[userId] = '$[USER]'

SELECT    CASE      -- A) col 15 = 0 → ตาม system (Net × Qty, ไม่ลด)      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN CAST($[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER] AS DECIMAL(19,6))      -- B) col 15 <> 0 → คำนวณ Amount + Check ปกติ (Exclusive)      ELSE        CAST(          $[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER]          - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

SELECT    CASE      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.15.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN 0      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.14.NUMBER], 0) = 0        OR ISNULL($[$38.11.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN 0      ELSE        CAST(          $[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER]          * $[$38.15.NUMBER] / 100          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

SELECT T0.SeriesFROM NNM1 T0WHERE T0.Remark LIKE (    SELECT T1.GroupName     FROM OCRG T1     WHERE T1.GroupCode = $[$16.0.0])
SELECT U_SLD_AccountCodeFROM OCRG WHERE OCRG.GroupCode=$[OCRD.GroupCode]

SELECTCASE WHEN $[OCRD.U_SLD_Title] = N'บริษัท' THEN ISNULL($[OCRD.U_SLD_Title], '') + ' ' + ISNULL($[OCRD.U_SLD_FullName], '')ELSE ISNULL($[OCRD.U_SLD_Title], '') + ISNULL($[OCRD.U_SLD_FullName], '')END

SELECT    CASE      -- A) col 15 = 0 → ตาม system (Net × Qty, ไม่ลด)      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN CAST($[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER] AS DECIMAL(19,6))      -- B) col 15 <> 0 → คำนวณ Amount + Check ปกติ (Exclusive)      ELSE        CAST(          $[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER]          - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

SELECT    CASE      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.15.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN 0      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.14.NUMBER], 0) = 0        OR ISNULL($[$38.11.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN 0      ELSE        CAST(          $[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER]          * $[$38.15.NUMBER] / 100          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

QueryName: JE BP Address (ที่อยู่คู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT concat(T0.[Street],' ',T0.[StreetNo],' ',T0.[Block],' ', T0.[City],' ',T0.[County], '  ',T0.[ZipCode]) FROM CRD1 T0  INNER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] WHERE (T0.[GlblLocNum] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_LPBranch] and T0.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B' )  or ( $[JDT1.U_SLD_LPBranch]  = ' ' and T0.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B' )

QueryName: JE_Select BP Name (ชื่อคู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[U_SLD_FullName]From OCRD T0where T0.[CardCode] = $[$76.U_SLD_SuppCode]

QueryName: JE_Select Tax Id (เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษี)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[LicTradNum] FROM OCRD T0  where T0.Cardcode = $[JDT1.U_SLD_Suppcode]

QueryName: JE Select BP Branch (สาขาคู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[GlblLocNum]From CRD1 T0inner join OCRD T1 on T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode]where T1.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B'

QueryName: JE Cal WhBaseAmount (ฐานภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
QueryBody: SELECT (($[$76.6.number]*100)/(SELECT T0.[Rate]       FROM OWHT T0                where T0.[WTcode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_WTcode] ))

QueryName: JE_JV Select WH Code (รหัสภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[WTCode], T0.[WTName], T0.[Rate] FROM OWHT T0 WHERE T0.[Inactive] = 'N'
